frontier: Erdos 142 (asymptotic behavior of r_3(N)). Alternating-return conditional lower-bound lane targeting constant 2.649701794... vs the EHPS baseline 2.666539... (arXiv:2406.12290).
action:
Milestone: v4_loop_opened; contract=sha256:dd6ceb15509f4fbd910e80ac10624e9c31ba8a690f7b0d80054795ef0156eff7
Ran the V4 validation gates and opened the H2-priced Benders/Bellman loop. Gate 1 (slot throughput): all 4,386 slots of median target 3205 certified, zero failures, 54.61 exact certificates/second/core, 90.6% zero-gap. Gates 2/2b (dual moment-polytope vertex banks, full and active-support-restricted) failed closed on enumeration budget (123-minute and 10-minute caps on one 14-dimensional polytope). Launched the iteration-1 compile on the primal route: ~56.7M slot certificates under the V3 candidate, hash-validated resumable shards, projected ~13.5 hours on 20 workers, smoke-tested byte-identical against the sealed probe.
verified:
Scaling probe: 4,386/4,386 slots with exactly-promoted Handelman certificates (polynomial identity checked coefficient-by-coefficient), zero failures.
Compile smoke: target 3205 recompiled, zero failures, all 4,386 gammas byte-identical to sealed certificates.
V4 opening seal SHA-256: ea6c46e52cf24dd624db1edab7c561fdc7ed0a157ea599167b3bcc9afd8dd243
Gate-2 fail-closed record SHA-256: 3a020dc263a16fef1ef112ff38e884b91cf5cb6b1d6f3f8f2e2306aa56b5ea25
Session frontier report SHA-256: dd6ceb15509f4fbd910e80ac10624e9c31ba8a690f7b0d80054795ef0156eff7
result: Progress. The V4 loop protocol is frozen (6-iteration Benders cap; termination states CERTIFIED / H2_INFEASIBLE / ITERATION_CAP) and its one-time pricing compile is running. The dual-bank accelerator is sealed off as budget-infeasible; the primal certificate route is validated and costed at 0.49 days per full repricing pass. Not an Erdos 142 solution.
next_gate: Compile completion (124 shards), then the exact Bellman/min-mean oracle engine over the 5,217,957-state phase-0 graph under the compiled slot prices plus per-class theta interval add-ons; first oracle pass under V3 generates iteration-1 Benders rows.
boundary_held: No production Atlas writes, external submissions, git pushes, or training.
